sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A khe phungah na lungkhamnate va nga in,
Amah’n nang tangin hong puaksak ding hi;
thumna hong dawngin nang hong lungnuamsak in,
Ahoih penin hong vaihawmsak ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na neihsa piak tawm lua, ci-in kisuang ken la,
A tokhom zuat ding lau ngaihsut kei in;
etlawm thumanna le a siangtho itna,
Ama tau ah biakpiakna cing hikhin

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lau kawm, liing kawmin tuate i va puak ciangin,
Lungkim takin Topa’n hong sang ding
Launa teng zong lawpna, muanna suak hi.
